summary: Up to 10 year delay in onset of early-onset Alzheimer's (possibly)

See additional discussion at rs1129844, and the citation to the study in which Supplementary Figure 5 shows a statistically nonsignificant, although positive, trend towards delayed onset of dementia in a UCSF patient cohort of late-onset Alzheimer's patients carrying the (A;A) rs1129844 genotype. This should be viewed cautiously until confirmed in larger Alzheimer's populations.
